curation_notes: Substrate and donor-sugar supply feeds lipid-linked oligosaccharide assembly.
Assembled LLO is transferred en bloc to nascent protein by OST.
Transferred glycan enters ER trimming and folding quality-control cycle.
Folded glycoproteins move from ER quality control to Golgi processing.
Core-processed glycans become substrates for GlcNAc branching.
Branched glycans receive terminal fucose, galactose, sialic acid, sulfate, and related modifications.
Donor sugar biosynthesis and transport also support terminal fucosylation, galactosylation, and sialylation.
